1.content: Which one of the girls will you be?
1.title: Who are you

choices: I need to teach her a lesson.
I need to make a response video.
11.content: You're at your home, checking Instagram when you receive messages from fans, they're links to someone named Lil Tay, and she's with Danielle Brigoli, dissing you.
11.title: Woah Vicky

choices: wear the socks for a few extra days
111.content: After watching Danielle and Lil Tay slander your name like that an idea pops into Vicky's head and she grabs a hand full of old dirty sweaty socks she checks to see if they're good enough for the job before even getting halfway to her face the rancid smell of cheese and popcorn bombards her noes but they can be worse
111.title: I need to teach her a lesson.

1111.content: Vicky decide to wear them a few extra days she go everywhere she go on jogs, goes to sleep in them, and even to the gym she's been wearing them for about a week straight and even in the shoes she wears she can smell them she goes back home and grabs some tools to prepare for later Danielle's house is a good hour and half away from your house so you can either walk there or call your friend Dixie D'Amelio
1111.title: wear the socks for a few extra days

choices: Yes, we will meet up this weekend.
Fuck off, I don't need a fangirl.
12.content: You're sitting at home on your phone, checking Instagram when you notice you've got a message. You check the message to see it's a girl named Lil Tay, she says she's your biggest fan and she'd like to be your friend, an apprentice if you will.
12.title: Danielle Brigoli

info.brief_description: One will fall to the other in submission.
info.description: You can either be Woah Vicky, or Danielle Brigoli. One will become the other's mindless and loyal slave in the end.
